config.textAdventure.locale.description: UI language for Webview, extension messages, and GM narrative prompts. Also changeable from the Webview header dropdown.
config.textAdventure.skillPath.descripti: Absolute path to the comfyui_generate.py script
config.textAdventure.imageGen.backend.de: Image generation backend. All options speak the ComfyUI API; this is mostly a label — the actual endpoint is set by imageGen.comfyuiUrl.
config.textAdventure.imageGen.comfyuiUrl: ComfyUI / Stability Matrix server URL. Change the port here if your server is not on 8188.
config.textAdventure.imageGen.checkpoint: Checkpoint (.safetensors) name to use, exactly as shown by 'LoreRelay: List Image Models' — it may include a subfolder prefix, e.g. 'IL\prefectIllustriousXL_v8.safetensors'. Leave empty to use the workflow default.
config.textAdventure.imageGen.workflowPa: Optional path to a custom ComfyUI API-format workflow JSON. Leave empty to use the bundled workflow_api.json.
config.textAdventure.imageGen.controlNet: ControlNet model filename for cartography world maps (SDXL Canny). Leave empty to use the workflow default.
config.textAdventure.imageGen.steps.desc: Sampling steps override (0 = use workflow default, typically 20).
config.textAdventure.imageGen.cfg.descri: CFG scale override (0 = use workflow default, typically 7).
config.textAdventure.imageGen.width.desc: Image width override in pixels (0 = use workflow default, typically 512).
config.textAdventure.imageGen.height.des: Image height override in pixels (0 = use workflow default, typically 512).
config.textAdventure.imageGen.autoOnLoca: Automatically generate a scene image when the player's location changes in the World Forge.
config.textAdventure.imageGen.includeFac: Include the controlling faction's atmosphere in the generated location image prompt.
config.textAdventure.imageGen.includeDan: Include the region's danger level atmosphere in the generated location image prompt.
config.textAdventure.cartography.lora.de: LoRA filename for world map generation (ComfyUI models/loras name, e.g. mapcraft_il_v1.safetensors). User/workspace setting only — repo default is empty (no LoRA). Overridden by TA_LORA env when set.
config.textAdventure.cartography.loraWei: LoRA strength for world maps (0 = use 0.45 when lora is set). Typical range 0.4–0.5 with ControlNet. Overridden by TA_LORA_WEIGHT env when set.
config.textAdventure.cartography.autoLoc: When enabled, queue a ComfyUI scene image automatically after the player moves to a new location (requires ComfyUI configuration). Default off.
Minimum GM turns between automatic location image generations (0–20). Default 3.
config.textAdventure.cartography.fogInPr: Append one line of unexplored region names to the GM [World] prompt (max ~40 tokens). Default off.
config.textAdventure.cartography.revealI: Append cartographyReveal instructions to the GM [World] prompt (map/hearsay remote region reveals). Default off.
config.textAdventure.chronicle.recapInPr: Inject a deterministic [Previously] recap from state_journal.ndjson on session resume (first GM turn). Default off.
config.textAdventure.chronicle.maxRecapL: Maximum lines in the [Previously] chronicle recap injected into the GM prompt (1–20). Default 5.
config.textAdventure.pacing.hintInPrompt: Append a one-line [Director — Pacing] hint when recent journal turns skew toward one beat (combat/social/etc.). Default off.
config.textAdventure.pacing.windowSize.d: Number of recent journal turns to classify for pacing skew (2–20). Default 5.
config.textAdventure.pacing.dominanceThr: Inject a hint when one beat accounts for at least this fraction of the window (0.5–1). Default 0.8.
config.textAdventure.reputation.inPrompt: Append a one-line [Player Reputation] summary to the GM World State prompt when enableFactionReputation is on. Default off.
Show Inspector debug control to advance emergent world simulation by N steps (updates world_state.json; GM turn count unchanged). Requires Emergent Simulation enabled. Default off.
config.textAdventure.debug.bulkWorldSimM: Maximum world simulation steps per bulk advance (1–100). Default 50.
config.textAdventure.modelScan.roots.des: Local folders to scan for model files (.safetensors, .gguf, .ckpt, .pt, .bin). Point this at your Stability Matrix Packages folder, ComfyUI folder, ComfyUI/models folder, or a direct model folder.
config.textAdventure.vlm.provider.descri: VLM provider for Soulgaze image analysis. Use Ollama for local models, or OpenRouter for cloud multimodal models (OpenAI/Gemini/Anthropic routes via OpenRouter API).
config.textAdventure.vlm.model.descripti: VLM model name (e.g. 'llava' for Ollama, 'google/gemini-2.0-flash' for OpenRouter).
config.textAdventure.vlm.endpoint.descri: Endpoint URL for the VLM provider (used for Ollama or custom local endpoints).
config.textAdventure.bgm.enabled.descrip: Enable automatic background music. The GM picks a track via the 'bgm' or 'mood' field in game_state.json.
config.textAdventure.bgm.manifestPath.de: Path to the BGM manifest JSON. Leave empty to use 'bgm.json' in the workspace root. Audio files are resolved relative to the manifest folder (and its 'bgm/' subfolder).
config.textAdventure.bgm.volume.descript: Default BGM volume (0-100). Can be adjusted live with the slider in the UI.
config.textAdventure.sfx.enabled.descrip: Enable one-shot sound effects. The GM triggers them via the 'sfx' field in game_state.json. Bundled license-free SFX work out of the box.
config.textAdventure.sfx.manifestPath.de: Path to the SFX manifest JSON. Leave empty to use 'sfx.json' in the workspace, falling back to the bundled skill sfx.json. Audio files resolve relative to the manifest folder (and its 'sfx/' subfolder).
Enable the background MediaAgent pipeline (early BGM/SFX from GM stream, queued ComfyUI image generation).
config.textAdventure.mediaAgent.autoImag: When a GM entry has imagePrompt but no image, queue ComfyUI generation in the background without blocking the next turn.
config.textAdventure.mediaAgent.maxImage: Maximum queued ComfyUI image jobs. Oldest jobs are dropped when full.
config.textAdventure.remotePlay.port.des: TCP port for the LAN remote player HTTP/WebSocket server.
config.textAdventure.remotePlay.bindAddr: Bind address for remote play. Use 0.0.0.0 for LAN/Tailscale access (warning: exposes server to network), or 127.0.0.1 for local-only.
config.textAdventure.remotePlay.inputCoo: Minimum milliseconds between remote player inputs per client.
config.textAdventure.remotePlay.defaultR: Default role for remote clients that omit ?role= or auth.role.
config.textAdventure.remotePlay.mediaUrl: Lifetime (seconds) of HMAC-signed /media URLs pushed to remote clients. Shorter values limit referrer/token leak exposure (60–3600).
config.textAdventure.workspaceFolder.des: When multiple workspace folders are open, use this folder name or path for game_state.json. Empty = first folder.
config.textAdventure.gitAutoCommitInterv: Interval of turns to auto-commit history to Git. Set to 0 to disable automatic Git commits.
config.textAdventure.gmBridge.provider.d: How player input from the Webview is sent to the GM.
config.textAdventure.gmBridge.python.des: Python executable for ollama/koboldcpp GM bridge scripts.
config.textAdventure.gmBridge.scriptPath: Optional path to any GM bridge script (e.g. ollama_gm.py). Sibling scripts in the same folder are resolved automatically.
config.textAdventure.gmBridge.ollama.url: Ollama API base URL (used when gmBridge.provider=ollama).
config.textAdventure.gmBridge.ollama.mod: Ollama model name (e.g. llama3.2, gemma3, qwen2.5).
KoboldCPP API base URL (used when gmBridge.provider=koboldcpp).
config.textAdventure.gmBridge.openRouter: Deprecated fallback OpenRouter API key. Prefer the LoreRelay: Set OpenRouter API Key command, which stores the key in VS Code SecretStorage.
OpenRouter model name to use (e.g. anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet, google/gemini-1.5-pro, openai/gpt-4o).
config.textAdventure.gmBridge.command.de: When gmBridge.provider=command, path to the executable (e.g. grok, or another CLI).
config.textAdventure.gmBridge.commandArg: Arguments for custom GM command. Placeholders: {actionFile} (recommended), {action}, {cwd}.
Automatically send player input from Webview to Grok Build (headless mode)
Path to grok CLI (auto-detects ~/.grok/bin/grok.exe on Windows when set to 'grok')
config.textAdventure.grokBridge.autoAppr: Pass --always-approve to grok for non-interactive tool approval. Warning: enabling this allows automated execution without prompt verification.
config.textAdventure.grokBridge.fallback: Copy player input to clipboard when Grok bridge is disabled or fails
Suggest archiving old history turns into saga chapters when the log grows long.
config.textAdventure.archive.thresholdSm: History turn count to suggest archive for Ollama / KoboldCPP / small OpenRouter models.
config.textAdventure.archive.thresholdLa: History turn count to suggest archive for Grok / Gemini-class large-context models.
config.textAdventure.archive.remindEvery: After the threshold, remind every N additional turns.
config.textAdventure.promptBudget.mode.d: Controls how much Lorebook, Memory, Saga, Party, NPC, and Vision context is injected into each GM prompt.
config.textAdventure.promptBudget.maxTok: Approximate target token budget for GM prompt context. 0 uses the selected mode default.
config.textAdventure.worldForge.defaultR: Default number of regions when generating a new World Forge.
config.textAdventure.worldForge.defaultF: Default number of factions when generating a new World Forge.
config.textAdventure.worldForge.defaultN: Default number of initial NPCs when generating a new World Forge.
config.textAdventure.worldForge.llmEnric: When enabled, LLM is used to enrich generated world descriptions (experimental).
config.textAdventure.memory.backend.desc: Memory Bank search backend for GM prompt injection.
config.textAdventure.worldIntent.vehicle: Developer/operator diagnostic mode for World Intent vs legacy vehicleOps parity. Legacy vehicleOps remain authoritative; off disables parity work.
